title: {YTP} ~ Taking the Watch Five
description:
It's been a long time since I've had this much fun editing!

A bit of background: The source here is a series of announcement videos put together by a local media team for their church. I helped out a time or two and saw lots of potential. Since Vest here is someone I know, I gave him the opportunity and the final say in whether the video even got posted... And he loved it!

Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support

FAQ: https://elliespectacular.com/faq

DaThings2: http://www.youtube.com/user/DaThings2
